data.title: Morgan Stanley Bitcoin Trust Wallet Identified with Significant Holdings
data.description: Arkham has identified the on-chain wallet address of the Morgan Stanley Bitcoin Trust (MSBT). According to Foresight News, this wallet currently holds 1,348 BTC.

data.title: U.S. Lawmaker Maxine Waters Faces Crypto Industry Influence
data.description:
California Democratic Representative Maxine Waters, a prominent figure in Congress advocating for stricter cryptocurrency regulation, is facing scrutiny as her opponent, nonprofit executive Myla Rahman, receives significant campaign funding from the crypto industry. According to BlockBeats, Rahman has raised approximately $14,500 since announcing her candidacy in February, with about 69% of the funds coming from the crypto sector. The largest single donation of $6,600 was made by Brad Garlinghouse, with additional support from executives at the Solana Policy Institute.

Waters, a senior member of the House Financial Services Committee, has been a strong proponent of increased regulation in the crypto industry. If the Democrats succeed in the upcoming midterm elections, she is poised to become the chair of the Financial Services Committee. Analysts suggest that this potential shift is prompting the crypto industry to strategically allocate political resources to influence future regulatory frameworks.

Currently, the crypto industry is advocating for the passage of the Clarity Act, which aims to establish a more lenient regulatory environment. However, this legislation faces strong opposition from the traditional banking sector, which fears it could lead to a shift of deposits into the crypto market.

Despite her regulatory stance, Waters has previously received political donations from Chris Larsen, indicating that crypto capital is strategically engaging with both parties and across different regulatory perspectives.

data.title: Arkham: The on-chain address for the Morgan Stanley Bitcoin ETF has been identified, currently holding 1348 Bitcoins.
data.description: Arkham announced on its X platform that it has identified the on-chain wallet address of Morgan Stanley Bitcoin Trust (MSBT), becoming the first platform to publicly identify the ETF's on-chain BTC holdings, allowing users to track fund inflows and outflows in real time. The Morgan Stanley Bitcoin ETF was listed on the NYSE Arca on April 8th, with Coinbase and BNY Mellon serving as custodians. According to Arkham's tracking data, it currently holds 1348 BTC, worth approximately $103.92 million.

data.title: Challenges Facing Young People Amid Economic Disparities
data.description: PANews posted on X (formerly Twitter). Bitwise advisor Jeff Park has expressed concerns about the financial challenges facing the younger generation. According to Park, the current financial system has structurally collapsed, leading to a widening gap between the wealthy and the less affluent. While the assets of the rich continue to appreciate, the wages of the poor are diminishing, creating an ever-deepening divide. This economic disparity has prompted many millennials to turn to Bitcoin, especially following the Occupy Wall Street movement, as they seek alternatives in the face of these challenges.

data.title: Iran Declines Next Round of Talks with the U.S.
data.description: Iran has not agreed to hold the next round of negotiations with the United States, according to ChainCatcher. The report, originally from Iran's Tasnim News Agency, highlights the ongoing diplomatic tensions between the two nations. The decision comes amid complex geopolitical dynamics and unresolved issues that continue to challenge bilateral relations.

data.title: Binance Wallet Introduces New Features for Enhanced User Experience
data.description:
Binance announced on X a series of updates to its wallet services aimed at improving user experience and functionality. The latest enhancements include a streamlined process for purchasing tokens, improved asset management features, and additional tools for decentralized finance (DeFi) enthusiasts.

The new update allows users to swiftly purchase tokens by searching for their addresses, simplifying the buying process significantly. Additionally, the asset page now displays the annualized yield rates of mainstream cryptocurrencies, providing users with quick access to investment opportunities. This feature is designed to help users make informed decisions by offering a clear view of potential returns.

For DeFi users, the wallet now supports staking and redemption directly from the token details page. This update also includes information on the protocols and annualized yield rates, offering a comprehensive overview for users interested in DeFi activities. Furthermore, a new 'Hot Radar' section has been added to the favorites bar, enabling users to explore trending topics and signals with ease.

These updates reflect Binance's ongoing commitment to enhancing its platform's usability and functionality. By integrating these features, Binance aims to provide a more seamless and informative experience for its users, catering to both novice and experienced cryptocurrency enthusiasts. The platform continues to evolve, offering tools and features that align with the dynamic needs of the digital asset community.

data.title: HIGH surged above 0.4 USDT, a 315% increase in the last 24 hours.
data.description: Market data shows that HIGH (Highstreet) has risen above 0.4 USDT and is currently trading at 0.478 USDT, representing a 24-hour increase of 315%.

data.title: Highstreet Token Surges Over 315% in 24 Hours
data.description: Highstreet (HIGH) has experienced a significant price increase, surpassing 0.4 USDT. According to Odaily, the token is currently trading at 0.478 USDT, marking a 24-hour rise of 315%.

data.title: Saudi Arabia's Sovereign Wealth Fund Reduces Spending Amid Cash Strains
data.description: Saudi Arabia's sovereign wealth fund is scaling back its expenditures due to financial pressures, impacting its ambitious mega-projects and notable international investments. Wall Street Journal (Markets) posted on X that the fund, known for its significant global presence, is facing challenges in maintaining its previous levels of investment. The decision to reduce spending comes as the fund navigates economic constraints, prompting a reassessment of its financial strategies. This move is expected to influence the progress of several high-profile projects and investments worldwide, reflecting the broader economic adjustments within the kingdom.

data.title: Iran says it has not yet agreed to hold the next round of talks with the United States.
data.description: According to Iran's Tasnim News Agency on the 18th, Iran has not yet agreed to hold the next round of negotiations with the United States. (Xinhua)

data.title: Bitget's IPO Prime preSPAX saw over $70 million invested within three hours of opening for subscription.
data.description: According to official sources, within three hours of its launch, Bitget's first IPO Prime project, preSPAX, attracted 4,633 participants, with total subscriptions exceeding $70,061,640. The subscription operates on a first-come, first-served basis, and will close once the maximum subscription limit is reached. More details can be found on the official Bitget platform.

data.title: Kieran Dennis Discusses Challenges in Agent Blockchain Experience
data.description: PANews posted on X (formerly Twitter). Kieran Dennis, co-founder of Z Protocol, shared insights on the integration of agents with blockchain technology. He acknowledged that while the principles and tools for this integration are established, the current on-chain experience for agents is poorly designed. Dennis emphasized the need for a balance between privacy, compliance, and selective disclosure to improve the functionality of agents within the blockchain ecosystem. He argued that agents do not require a revolution but rather a streamlined path within the crypto framework to operate effectively.

data.title: Bitget's IPO Prime Project preSPAX Attracts Over 4,600 Participants
data.description: Bitget's IPO Prime project, preSPAX, has seen significant interest since its subscription opened, with participation from 4,633 individuals within the first three hours. According to Foresight News, the total subscription amount has exceeded $70,061,640. The subscription process follows a first-come, first-served model, closing once the limit is reached. Further details are available on Bitget's official platform.

data.title: Iraq to Resume Oil Exports from All Fields in Coming Days
data.description: Iraq's Ministry of Oil has announced plans to resume exports from all oil fields in the coming days. According to BlockBeats, this decision follows recent disruptions in the country's oil export activities. The move is expected to stabilize Iraq's oil production and contribute to global supply. The Ministry did not specify the exact timeline for the resumption but emphasized the importance of restoring operations swiftly to meet international demand.

data.title: IMO Urges Diplomatic Efforts for Stranded Sailors in Persian Gulf
data.description: IMO Secretary-General Dominguez has reported that approximately 20,000 sailors and over 2,000 ships are currently stranded in the Persian Gulf. According to NS3.AI, Dominguez has called on nations to enhance diplomatic efforts to facilitate evacuation plans for the affected crew members. He emphasized the need for shipping activities in the Strait of Hormuz to resume once mines and other hazards are cleared, allowing insurers to provide reasonably priced coverage.

data.title: Whale Profits from Ethereum Trading Strategy
data.description: A large cryptocurrency investor has successfully executed a profitable trading strategy involving Ethereum (ETH). According to Odaily, the investor borrowed 28 million USDT from Aave in February to purchase 12,802 ETH at an average price of $2,187. Following a rise in ETH prices, the investor sold 12,402 ETH at an average price of $2,271, repaying the loan with 28.16 million USDT and netting a profit of 400 ETH.

data.title: The market capitalization of the Ethereum blockchain's Meme coin ASTEROID briefly fell below $16 million, a 25.56% drop in 6 hours.
data.description: According to GMGN data, the market capitalization of the Ethereum blockchain Meme coin ASTEROID briefly fell below $16 million, currently trading at $16.67 million, a 25.56% drop in 6 hours. Odaily reminds users that Meme coin prices are highly volatile, and investors should be aware of the risks. Meme coins generally lack real-world applications and rely more on speculative hype; caution is advised when entering the market.

data.title: A trader who previously made a 3500-fold profit spent 10,000 USDC to buy 1.12 million SPIKE tokens four hours ago.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, trader “J3jfq8” spent 10,000 USDC to buy 1.12 million SPIKE tokens 4 hours ago. Previously, he made at least $3.8 million in profit on MOODENG, achieving a return of more than 3,500 times, by spending 8.1 SOL ($1,072) to buy 33.4 million MOODENG tokens, which were worth only $320,000 at the time, and then sold them for profit through DEX and MEXC.

data.title: A whale leveraged a long position of 12,400 ETH and profited 400 ETH.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ember, a whale borrowed 28 million USDT from Aave in February and bought 12,802 ETH at an average price of $2,187. After the recent rise in ETH prices, the whale sold 12,402 ETH at an average price of $2,271, receiving 28.16 million USDT to repay the loan and netting a profit of 400 ETH.
